steps.title: Use the rejection clue
steps.content: The phrase this rejection explains the blank. Harjo's series rejects the tendency to place Native characters only in the distant past by showing contemporary Native teenagers.

steps.title: Pick the rejection verb
steps.content: Choice B means announces, Choice C means predicts, and Choice D means withdraws a belief one previously held. The verb that means rejects or refuses to accept fits the sentence. The answer is A.
